faqs.question: What is the minimum account balance?
faqs.answer: The minimum account balance requirement is $25 for checking accounts and $100 for savings accounts.

faqs.question: How long does a transfer take?
faqs.answer: Domestic transfers typically complete within 1-3 business days. International transfers may take 5-7 business days.

faqs.question: What are your overdraft fees?
faqs.answer: Each overdraft is charged $35. We allow up to 3 overdrafts per day.

policies.description: All customer data is encrypted and protected in compliance with GDPR and PCI DSS standards.
Accounts can be accessed via mobile app, web portal, and in-branch. Two-factor authentication is recommended.
